Si un outil est cassé, envoie IMMÉDIATEMENT un message WhatsApp à Gilles (+33652345180) pour le prévenir. Si tout fonctionne, réponds juste HEARTBEAT_OK.
Current time: Thursday, March 12th, 2026 — 1:45 AM (UTC)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
Let me run all the checks in parallel.
